title: Where I want to be in the next years
summary: A practical outline of my long-term direction, responsibilities I want to take, and goals I am aiming for.
content: My long-term direction is to grow into a role that combines ownership, reliability, and continuous learning.
I want to contribute not only by doing tasks well, but also by helping structure work and improving team outcomes.
This post records the direction so I can revisit it and adjust goals over time.
